description_long: This is a modern basketball with a striking black surface and gold seams, giving it a premium and stylish appearance. The ball features a pebbled texture typical of basketballs, which enhances grip and control during play. The gold seams are cleanly defined and follow the traditional basketball panel pattern, creating a visually appealing contrast against the matte black background. There are no visible logos, brand markings, or signs of wear, suggesting it is either new or well-maintained. The surface finish appears grippy and semi-soft, ideal for both indoor and outdoor urban play. The ball is spherical and of standard basketball size, suitable for use in parks, courts, or recreational urban spaces.
description: A black basketball with gold seams and a pebbled, grippy texture, featuring a modern, premium look with no visible logos or wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black surface with prominent gold seams forming a cross and curved pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuous gold seam encircling the ball horizontally, with less visible vertical seams.
description_view_2: Opposite front view, nearly identical to view 0, with the same gold seam cross and curved pattern.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, emphasizing the horizontal gold seam and the pebbled black surface.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with traditional basketball seam arrangement, gold seams forming intersecting curved and straight lines.
